name: Chipped Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a white sauce by melting the butter in a double boiler.
2. Stir in the flour and gradually add the milk.
3. Cook, stirring constantly until the sauce is thickened.
4. Add pepper and check for salt. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
5. This recipe will make enough sauce for about 6-8 muffin halves, depending on how generous you are with the sauce.
6. Serve over toasted English Muffins.
